dialogue_text: Oh, yes; you can save our friend, the Cowardly Lion, who is asleep in the poppy bed.
source_excerpt: "Nothing that I know of," answered the Woodman; but the Scarecrow, who had been trying to think, but could not because his head was stuffed with straw, said, quickly, "Oh, yes; you can save our friend, the Cowardly Lion, who is asleep in...
